arguments.command:
# Get coordinates for Düsseldorf and fetch weather + sunrise/sunset
curl -s "https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=51.2217&longitude=6.7762&current=temperature_2m,weather_code,cloud_cover,is_day,direct_radiation,diffuse_radiation&hourly=direct_radiation,diffuse_radiation&timezone=Europe%2FBerlin&forecast_days=1" -o /tmp/weather.json && echo "Weather fetched" &
curl -s "https://api.sunrise-sunset.org/json?lat=51.2217&lng=6.7762&formatted=0" -o /tmp/sunrise.json && echo "Sunrise fetched" &
wait
cat /tmp/weather.json
echo "---"
cat /tmp/sunrise.json
arguments.description: Fetch weather and sunrise/sunset for Düsseldorf
